description: A realistic fantasy portrait prompt for generating a regal rabbit-themed woman in ornate winter hanfu standing in a snowy mountain temple setting.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 生成身着华丽冬季汉服的兔子主题女性角色，站在雪山寺庙场景中的写实奇幻肖像提示词。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 生成身著華麗冬季漢服的兔子主題女性角色，站在雪山寺廟場景中的寫實奇幻肖像提示詞。
description_i18n.ja: 雪山の寺院を背景に、豪華な冬のHanfuを着た兎をテーマにした女性のリアルなファンタジーポートレートを生成するプロンプト。
description_i18n.ko: 화려한 겨울 Hanfu를 입은 토끼 테마 여성이 눈 덮인 산 사원에 서 있는 사실적인 판타지 초상화 생성 프롬프트.
description_i18n.de: Ein realistisches Fantasy-Porträt-Prompt zur Generierung einer majestätischen Frau im Hasen-Thema in ornamentalem Winter-Hanfu in einem verschneiten Bergtempel.
description_i18n.fr: Un prompt de portrait fantastique réaliste pour générer une femme majestueuse sur le thème du lapin en Hanfu d'hiver orné dans un temple de montagne enneigé.
description_i18n.ru: Промпт для создания реалистичного фэнтезийного портрета величественной женщины в кроличьей тематике в изящном зимнем Hanfu в заснеженном горном храме.
description_i18n.es: Un prompt de retrato fantástico realista para generar una mujer regia con temática de conejo en elaborado Hanfu invernal en un templo de montaña nevado.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Um prompt de retrato fantástico realista para gerar uma mulher régia com tema de coelho em Hanfu de inverno ornamentado em um templo de montanha nevado.
description_i18n.it: Un prompt per ritratti fantasy realistici che genera una donna regale a tema coniglio in elaborato Hanfu invernale in un tempio di montagna innevato.
description_i18n.vi: Prompt chân dung giả tưởng chân thực để tạo hình người phụ nữ uy nghiêm theo chủ đề thỏ trong trang phục Hanfu mùa đông cầu kỳ tại đền núi tuyết phủ.
description_i18n.pl: Prompt realistycznego portretu fantasy do generowania majestatycznej kobiety w króliczej tematyce w ozdobnym zimowym Hanfu w ośnieżonej górskiej świątyni.
description_i18n.id: Prompt potret fantasi realistis untuk menghasilkan wanita agung bertema kelinci dalam Hanfu musim dingin yang mewah di kuil pegunungan bersalju.
description_i18n.nl: Een realistische fantasy portret-prompt voor het genereren van een majestueuze vrouw met konijnenthema in sierlijke winter Hanfu in een besneeuwde bergtempel.
description_i18n.ar: موجه صورة خيالية واقعية لإنشاء امرأة ملكية بتصميم الأرنب ترتدي Hanfu شتوي مزخرف في معبد جبلي مثلج.
description_i18n.tr: Karlı dağ tapınağında süslü kış Hanfu'su giyen tavşan temalı görkemli bir kadın oluşturmak için gerçekçi fantezi portre promptu.
description_i18n.uk: Промпт для створення реалістичного фентезійного портрета величної жінки в кролячій тематиці у витонченому зимовому Hanfu в засніженому гірському храмі.
description_i18n.en: A realistic fantasy portrait prompt for generating a regal rabbit-themed woman in ornate winter hanfu standing in a snowy mountain temple setting.

query.en: A cinematic fantasy portrait of an elegant East Asian-inspired woman standing outdoors in a snowy mountain temple courtyard, centered in the frame from about waist-up. She wears a luxurious winter hanfu in glossy white and deep black satin with soft white fur trim at the collar and sleeves, embroidered with rabbit motifs and delicate floral patterns. Her long straight hair is silver-white, falling over both shoulders, and she wears an ornate silver headdress with filigree, pearls, dangling tassels, a pale turquoise jewel, and prominent upright white rabbit ears. Her face is deliberately obscured by a smooth rectangular blur block. Snow is falling across the scene. The background shows a dramatic cold blue-gray sky, snow-covered pine trees, distant jagged mountains, stone lanterns, and traditional Chinese temple buildings with curved tiled roofs on the right side. Mood is ethereal, regal, and wintry, with soft diffused lighting, shallow depth of field, high detail fabric texture, realistic fantasy styling, and a polished gpt-image-2 aesthetic.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：A cinematic fantasy portrait of an elegant East Asian-inspired woman standing outdoors in a snowy mountain temple courtyard, centered in the frame from about waist-up. She wears a luxurious winter hanfu in glossy white and deep black satin with soft white fur trim at the collar and sleeves, embroidered with rabbit motifs and delicate floral patterns. Her long straight hair is silver-white, falling over both shoulders, and she wears an ornate silver headdress with filigree, pearls, dangling tassels, a pale turquoise jewel, and prominent upright white rabbit ears. Her face is deliberately obscured by a smooth rectangular blur block. Snow is falling across the scene. The background shows a dramatic cold blue-gray sky, snow-covered pine trees, distant jagged mountains, stone lanterns, and traditional Chinese temple buildings with curved tiled roofs on the right side. Mood is ethereal, regal, and wintry, with soft diffused lighting, shallow depth of field, high detail fabric texture, realistic fantasy styling, and a polished gpt-image-2 aesthetic.
